domains.title: Onboarding & first-run setup
domains.rationale: All default-pack seeds are correctly created in scheduled state with appropriate logs, meeting the journey expectations.

domains.title: Core data model & overview surface
domains.rationale: All documented task kinds reached the expected scheduled state with correct log entries

domains.title: Habits
domains.rationale: All terminal statuses and pipeline behavior match the expected habit flow

domains.title: Routines & multi-step daily flows
domains.rationale: All tasks reached their expected terminal states and pipeline children were created and scheduled as defined

domains.title: Tasks (one-off)
domains.rationale: The task reached completed status with appropriate reason despite early completion, which is allowed per rules.

domains.title: Goals
domains.rationale: The watcher remains scheduled with the appropriate quiet_hours gate and no premature fire or completion, matching the expected terminal state.

domains.title: Reminders & escalation ladder
domains.rationale: The high-priority reminder correctly remains a single scheduled task without premature escalation tasks, adhering to lazy ladder evaluation rules.

domains.title: Calendar journeys
domains.rationale: The recap task was correctly skipped and the onSkip followup was created with scheduled status and proper parent linkage.

domains.title: Inbox & email triage
domains.rationale: The output task reached completed status with correct terminal state and log entries, adhering to all spine rules.

domains.title: Travel
domains.rationale: The approval task completed and correctly spawned a scheduled output child as defined by the onComplete pipeline.

domains.title: Follow-up repair (relationships)
domains.rationale: The watcher task completed as expected with correct status and completion check handling.

domains.title: Documents, signatures, portals
domains.rationale: The reminder correctly transitioned to failed and spawned a scheduled followup with proper pipelineParentId, matching expected terminal states.

domains.title: Self-control / app & website blockers
domains.rationale: The task correctly evaluated the travel gate, fired, and reached the expected terminal status with appropriate logs.

domains.title: Group chat handoff
domains.rationale: The custom watcher task is correctly created with the specified properties and remains in the scheduled state as expected.

domains.title: Multi-channel & cross-channel search
domains.rationale: The task is correctly scheduled with the required contextRequest and maintains the expected terminal status.

domains.title: Activity signals & screen context
domains.rationale: The task reached completed status via the health_signal_observed check within the lookback window, and all required fields and transitions are correct.

domains.title: Approval queues & action gating
domains.rationale: The approval task reached the expected dismissed terminal state with correct log transitions and no required fire event.

domains.title: Identity merge (canonical person)
domains.rationale: The watcher task reached completed status with correct terminal fields and log entries, adhering to all spine rules.

domains.title: Memory recall
domains.rationale: The task is correctly scheduled with the required output configuration and no incorrect behavior is observed.

domains.title: Connectors & permissions
domains.rationale: The task is correctly scheduled with high priority, carries the required metadata, and no invalid state transitions are present.

domains.title: Health, money, screen time
domains.rationale: The task is correctly scheduled with the appropriate watcher kind, trigger, priority, source, and health_signal_observed completion check, and no invalid behavior is observed.

domains.title: Push notifications
domains.rationale: The high-priority reminder is correctly scheduled without premature firing or missing required fields, and ladder behavior aligns with lazy evaluation rules.

domains.title: Remote sessions
domains.rationale: The task is correctly scheduled with required fields and no incorrect behavior observed.

domains.title: Settings & UX
domains.rationale: The task is correctly scheduled with ownerVisible false and appropriate metadata, and no firing is required.

domains.title: REST API access flows
domains.rationale: The task is correctly created with source='plugin', ownerVisible=false, and remains in scheduled state as expected.

domains.title: Workflows (event-triggered)
domains.rationale: The watcher completed and correctly spawned a scheduled output task as its onComplete child, matching expected terminal states and pipeline behavior.

domains.title: Multilingual coverage
domains.rationale: The reminder was correctly scheduled with the Spanish locale metadata and no incorrect behavior observed.

domains.title: Suspected-but-unconfirmed flows
domains.rationale: The custom task was scheduled and correctly dismissed with appropriate status and metadata, matching the expected terminal state.
